rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in the correct AADL scope: component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings.
Implementation-level contracts should only reference visible outputs or declared auxiliary variables in assign statements.
generic_rules: Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks to contain AGREE specifications.
Component type contracts should relate visible inputs to visible outputs without referencing subcomponent paths.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assign for output bindings instead.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements within annex blocks.
Valid AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; avoid AADL property names as variables.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Do not attempt to define AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of component structure
